summary: Completed frontend testing for iteration 118 features: /super-pension route, Family Wealth Dashboard chart names, Buffett Trading Engine, and Adviser Compliance Dashboard. All features working correctly.

issues: Michael Wheeler name slightly wrapped on Y-axis due to space constraints, but still readable

critical_code_review_comments: Buffett Engine navigation: The Buffett Engine link is in clientContextNav (shown when adviser selects a client) but NOT in personalNavGroups. This is by design - advisers see it when viewing client data. Consider adding to personalNavGroups if users should access it in Personal Mode.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: /super-pension loads SG Calculator, Family Wealth chart shows full names (James Wheeler, Sarah Wheeler, Emily Wheeler, Michael Wheeler), Buffett Trading Engine has all 5 tabs and macro overlay, Adviser Compliance Dashboard has all 5 tabs and metrics.

super_pension_route.details: Loads Superannuation Guarantee Calculator without runtime error. Shows SG Rate 2024-25: 11.5%, Total Annual SG calculation, employee management, and compliance disclaimers.

family_wealth_chart_names.details: Y-axis width increased to 120px. Full member names displayed: James Wheeler, Sarah Wheeler, Emily Wheeler, Michael Wheeler. No truncation.

buffett_trading_engine.details: Buffett-Style Investment Engine loads with all features

adviser_compliance_dashboard.details: Adviser Compliance Dashboard loads with all features

findings: Asset allocation exceeds risk profile tolerance

navigation_buffett_engine.details: Buffett Engine is in clientContextNav under Investments section. Appears when adviser selects a client. Route /buffett-trading is accessible directly.

mocked_apis_list: BuffettTradingEngine - uses local mock data for stock opportunities, PE bands, sector scores, backtest results
AdviserComplianceDashboard - uses local mock data for advice files, ASIC requirements, escalation levels
mocked_apis.notes: Both new components use local mock data for demonstration purposes as specified in the review request.
